description:
Operating Area: Aeolian Islands, Amalfi Coast, Bonifacio, Cagliari, Capraia, Corfu, Corsica, Costa Smeralda, Destinations, Elba Island, French Riviera / Corsica, Giannutri, Giglio Island, Grecia Ionica, Greece, Ionian Islands, Ischia, Italy, La Maddalena, Lefkas, Mediterranean, Naples, Olbia, Palmarola, Pontine Islands, Ponza, Porto Cervo, Porto Vecchio, Procida, Sardinia, Sicily, Sorrento, Tuscan Archipelago, Ustica, Ventotene

INDIAN is a Pleasure Yacht engaged in the Italian “occasional charter” scheme (VAT exempt).
INDIAN is an Explorer Vessel. The benefits of an Explorer Vessel are that it maximizes safety, in all types of weather with a large range, whilst minimizing fuel consumption. She is L.O.A 25 mt yacht, 7,5m wide, a 2,8m draft and her displacement is nearly 200 tons. With four bridges, her volume is equivalent to a 33m yacht.
INDIAN excels with her long cruising range up to 4500 nautical miles and her stylish Italian interior design being at the same time a seaworthy vessel unique on her own. INDIAN has a max R.I.N.A. security ranking class ‘A’ for no limit navigation.

“Green features“. Thanks to a considerable restructuring work, to a crew strongly interested in “environmental issues” and the protection of nature, Indian is gradually converting towards an increasingly “green” perspective, further reducing consumption including the introduction of LED lights for both interiors, exteriors and underwater lights, controls for energy dispersion and environmental impact as well as the use of a diesel purifier to have clean combustion and the use of natural materials with respect of the environment for its refits. In addition, the yacht uses only ceramic and glass plates and glasses, no plastic straws, etc. The use of plastic bottles is reduced to a minimum as there is a drinking water producer on board with which to fill the carafes for daily use.

Key Features
1) With her almost 200 gross tons, Indian is a seaworthy and a total safe vessel which ensures a very comfortable navigation in ordinary sea conditions;
2) Her up to 4.500 miles range means that she can navigate everywhere with a great deal of autonomy and a low fuel consumption. A consumption of only 70 litres at 10.5 knots, allows 4500 nm autonomy, perfect for long navigations. At 7.5/8 kts ‘night regime’ consumption can be reduced to 16/20 lt x hr.
3) The 4.000 lt water tank and the 300 lt x hr double fresh water production systems allow unlimited water availability. A dedicated system provides the necessary daily amount of drinking water to guests and crew;
4) Speed stabilizers underway and at anchor result in extreme comfort and almost zero noise and vibration;
5) 3 fridges and 5 freezers give great autonomy for long navigations or events on board.

The large exterior decks include dining areas, lounge spaces, an entertainment deck with full bar/BBQ and still leave room for up to a 21′ tender & additional toys.
In the wheelhouse only the best technology & navigational equipment can be found and large windows offer fantastic visibility. High tech audio system such as Sonos distributes different music in any different internal and external area of the yacht. A satellite Internet and TV connection allow communication at any latitude.
A professional level galley and the skill of the Chef will satisfy the most discerning guests

Accommodation: INDIAN offers 4 spacious ensuite cabins for up to 9 guests. One full-beam 25 sq. mt aft Master suite , one fore Vip cabin, two Twin cabins (one of them with an extra bunk bed) all giving comfortable space for groups of family and friends. Each cabin has audio equipment with access to music via the yacht’s SONOS central system. Each cabin is also equipped with TV satellite communication system so to be able to watch TV at any latitude.
Dining and entertaining on board of INDIAN is equally comfortable outside, both on the Upper deck with its BBQ, a 6 fires stove and the 10 seats dining table, than on the shaded Main deck where the two coffee tables can be converted to a dining table for up to 10 guests. In both cases the guests will enjoy the lovely view of the sea . Inside, a large 8 seats oval dining table in the salon will be used in all other occasions.
The top level equipment, the professionality, the sympathy and experience of Captain Fabrizio and his crew make of INDIAN a global cruising yacht with maximum comfort where enjoying a successful and relaxing vacation and …’last but not least’ thanks to very low fuel’s consumption, navigation costs are reduced to minimum.

blueprint.name: INDIAN
tenders: 8.0m Tender Rupert (VHF/Ais, charter plotter Ray marine, engine Yamaha 300 HP)

crew.name: Fabrizio Marazzi
crew.bio:
Spoken Languages: italian (mother tongue), english (good level) , spanish (good), french (standard)
Born in, Rome, 02th October 1981
Education: Technical diploma in energy systems with specialization in marine engineering
Titles: Captain of pleasure boats, with Yacht Master certiicate 200 gt and 500 gt on motor and sailing yachts.
Courses: all those planned , more number of additional courses in England and Italy + BLSD

Embarks :
2005 embark as a sailor on Azimut 86 S "Irisha",
2006/2007 Captain custom tender 13 mt ,
Since 2007 Fabrizio Marazzi is Captain on M/Y INDIAN. 2022 will be his 15th year on board !

Fabrizio is a reliable person, serious and competent, he has many years of national and international sailing experience, knows very well Greece, Sardinia, Sicily, Corsica, the italian Riviera, South of France and has an excellent technical knowledge of engines, he loves to play drums, singing as well as cooking. Fabrizio is always helpful and kind to everyone.
